name: Strata ("Christmas Casserole") (M_c-tx)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded Colby or mild cheddar cheese
6 Slices of bread, crusts removed and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Pour into a 9-inch X 13-inch pan.
3. Refrigerate overnight.
4. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
Most requested recipe from the 1992 Mother-Daughter Style Show/Luncheon. Perfect for Christmas morning—assemble it the night before so you don't miss any of the excitement on Christmas morning.
